Class AbstractDesignComplexExpression

java.lang.Object
ch.unibas.medizin.dynamicreports.design.base.expression.AbstractDesignComplexExpression
All Implemented Interfaces:
DRIDesignComplexExpression, DRIDesignExpression, Serializable
Direct Known Subclasses:
DRDesignComplexExpression, DRDesignValueFormatter, JasperSubreportParametersExpression, SubreportExpression, SubreportParametersExpression
public abstract class AbstractDesignComplexExpression extends Object implements DRIDesignComplexExpression

Abstract AbstractDesignComplexExpression class.

Author:
Ricardo Mariaca
